idea: Weekly Google Trends Surge in Pest Control Searches

data.source: Google Trends weekly search volume for 'pest control near me' and 'termite inspection' through google_trends adapter

behavior: Spikes in pest control searches correlate with seasonal property stress and localized economic downturn; homeowners prioritize pest mitigation when neighborhood conditions deteriorate or rental markets tighten.

market_impact.rationale: Rising pest control urgency signals deteriorating property conditions and neighborhood quality, pressuring real estate valuations and sentiment.

trade_logic.entry: When weekly Google Trends search volume for pest control queries rises 35% or more above the 8-week rolling average
trade_logic.exit: After 10 trading days or when search volume falls back to within 15% of rolling average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Seasonal pest activity and neighborhood stress cycles generate regular search spikes; threshold is tight enough to fire 2–4 times per quarter.

idea: Daily Freight Rail Car Loading Collapse Signal

data.source: AAR (Association of American Railroads) weekly rail car loadings via html_table scrape, converted to daily proxies

behavior: Rapid decline in rail car loadings precedes industrial contraction; freight logistics weakness is an early warning for manufacturing and consumer discretionary demand.

market_impact.rationale: Rail car loadings are a leading indicator of industrial production and inventory builds; collapse signals recession risk.

trade_logic.entry: When weekly rail car loadings fall 8% or more below the prior 12-week average
trade_logic.exit: After 15 trading days or once loadings stabilize within 3% of 12-week average for 2 consecutive weeks

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Rail loadings fluctuate seasonally and cyclically; 8% drops occur 2–3 times per year, reliably generating signals within monthly windows.

idea: Weekly RSS Count Spike on Warehouse Worker Injury Reports

data.source: RSS feed count aggregation for labor safety violations and warehouse injury reports via rss_count adapter

behavior: Spikes in reported warehouse worker injuries signal labor market stress, wage pressure, and operational cost escalation in logistics; presages margin compression.

market_impact.rationale: Rising workplace injuries reflect labor shortage, safety corner-cutting, and wage inflation that compress industrial sector profitability.

trade_logic.entry: When weekly RSS injury report count rises 40% above the 4-week rolling average
trade_logic.exit: After 12 trading days or once count returns to within 10% of rolling average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Warehouse injury reports are published regularly; threshold captures seasonal peaks and labor stress cycles; fires 1–2 times per month.

idea: Daily Stock Price Volatility Spike in XLU Relative to SPY

data.source: Yahoo Finance daily prices for XLU (utilities ETF) and SPY via price_only adapter

behavior: Utilities volatility spikes when energy cost shocks or grid stress events create input price uncertainty; relative volatility surge precedes defensive sector rotation.

market_impact.rationale: Utilities volatility spikes often reverse as defensive money rotates into the sector; mean reversion opportunity.

trade_logic.entry: When 5-day rolling volatility (realized standard deviation) of XLU exceeds that of SPY by 1.5x or more
trade_logic.exit: After 8 trading days or once XLU volatility falls back to within 1.1x of SPY volatility

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Utilities experience weekly volatility shocks; 1.5x threshold fires regularly during macro uncertainty or energy market turbulence.

idea: Weekly EV Charger Expansion in Underserved Regions

data.source: OpenChargeMap API weekly EV charger counts in rural and secondary markets via openchargemap adapter

behavior: Acceleration in charger deployment outside major metro areas signals government subsidy stimulation and broadening EV adoption; correlates with XLE weakness and XLK strength.

market_impact.rationale: Rural EV charger expansion cannibilizes traditional fuel demand and signals structural energy transition; pressures legacy energy sector valuations.

trade_logic.entry: When weekly EV charger count growth in non-metro regions exceeds 12% annualized rate (>0.2% per week) for 2 consecutive weeks
trade_logic.exit: After 20 trading days or once growth rate falls below 6% annualized

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Government subsidy cycles and corporate EV deployment initiatives drive regular acceleration pulses; fires 1–2 times per quarter.

idea: Daily Jump in Google Trends for 'Bank Account Overdraft Fees'

data.source: Google Trends daily search volume for 'overdraft fees', 'bank fees complaint' via google_trends adapter

behavior: Spikes in overdraft fee searches signal liquidity crises and account shortfalls among consumers; precedes weakness in consumer discretionary spending and loan demand.

market_impact.rationale: Rising overdraft searches indicate household cash flow stress and declining purchasing power; pressures discretionary sector earnings.

trade_logic.entry: When daily Google Trends search volume for overdraft-related queries spikes 50% above the 10-day rolling average
trade_logic.exit: After 6 trading days or once volume returns to within 15% of rolling average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Bill payment cycles and paycheck timing create regular search spikes; threshold fires 2–3 times per month.

idea: Weekly Airline Load Factor Collapse Below Historical Trendline

data.source: BTS (Bureau of Transportation Statistics) weekly airline load factor via bts_airline_load_factor adapter

behavior: Rapid load factor deterioration signals demand destruction and pricing power loss in leisure/business travel; precedes XLY and XLC weakness.

market_impact.rationale: Airline load factor collapse indicates consumer travel pullback and leisure spending compression.

trade_logic.entry: When weekly load factor falls 4% or more below the 13-week rolling average
trade_logic.exit: After 14 trading days or once load factor returns within 1.5% of rolling average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Seasonal travel demand swings and economic cycles drive regular 4%+ dips; fires 2–3 times per quarter.

idea: Daily Spike in RSS News Counts on Corporate Dividend Cuts

data.source: RSS feed count aggregation for 'dividend cut', 'dividend suspension' across financial news via rss_count adapter

behavior: Spikes in dividend cut announcements signal deteriorating corporate cash flow, recession expectations, and capital preservation; correlates with broad market weakness.

market_impact.rationale: Dividend cuts, especially from financial and dividend-reliant sectors, signal earnings stress and recession fears; pressures equity valuations.

trade_logic.entry: When daily RSS count for dividend-cut stories rises 45% above the 5-day rolling average
trade_logic.exit: After 8 trading days or once count returns within 10% of rolling average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Dividend cuts cluster around earnings seasons and credit stress events; fires 2–3 times per quarter.

idea: Weekly FRED Series CRB Commodity Index Drop Below 12-Month MA

data.source: FRED series CRB (Commodity Research Bureau Index) weekly data via fred_series adapter

behavior: Commodity index declines below long-term trend signal demand weakness and deflationary pressure; lead indicator for industrial and energy sector underperformance.

market_impact.rationale: CRB collapse signals commodity demand destruction and raw material price weakness; compresses materials and energy margins.

trade_logic.entry: When weekly CRB closes 6% or more below its 52-week moving average
trade_logic.exit: After 16 trading days or once CRB closes within 2% of 52-week MA

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Commodity cycles generate regular 6%+ dips below long-term trends; fires 1–2 times per quarter.

idea: Daily Liquidity Squeeze: VIX Spike with Shrinking XLK Volume

data.source: Yahoo Finance daily VIX, SPY, XLK prices and volume via price_only adapter

behavior: VIX spikes paired with collapsing tech sector volume signal forced liquidations and panic; precedes sharp mean-reversion bounces in growth stocks.

market_impact.rationale: Panic-driven tech sector volume collapses often reverse sharply as liquidity dries up and forced sellers capitulate; mean reversion opportunity.

trade_logic.entry: When VIX rises 25% above prior close AND XLK volume falls 30% below 20-day average on same day
trade_logic.exit: After 5 trading days or once VIX falls 10% from spike close

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Market panic events with liquidity drains occur regularly during equity sell-offs; fires 1–2 times per month during volatile regimes.
